{"society_power": 7.0, "state_power": 9.0, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "Civil rights movement rises amid Cold War security state", "reasoning": "The Red Scare's chilling of dissent roughly offset the rising civil rights mobilization (Brown, Montgomery, McCarthy's censure), leaving society power steady; the Cold War national-security buildup, interstate highways, and NDEA reinforced an already very strong state, holding it at the top of the rubric."}
